programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the crash of an armoured transport bus carrying Naval brig detainees after four prisoners escape, including a black market broker who is one of the country's biggest security threats. Meanwhile, Pride turns to Gibbs for help.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Recruits
programme.desc: After a Navy SEAL is found murdered in a sorority house, the team must determine if the motive pertained to one of his classified missions or collegiate foul play. Meanwhile, Pride's daughter, Laurel, pays the NCIS office a visit.

programme.title: Movie: Batman v Superman: Dawn of Justice
programme.desc: Criminal mastermind Lex Luthor manipulates Batman into a pre-emptive battle with Superman, whom Luthor is obsessed with defeating.

programme.title: Movie: Man of Steel
programme.desc: A young man with extraordinary powers must confront his alien heritage when outcast members of his race invade Earth to claim it as their new home.

programme.title: Movie: Enemy of the State
programme.desc: A successful lawyer finds himself the target of a treacherous National Security Agency official after receiving evidence to a politically motivated murder. The only man that can help him is a former government operative turned surveillance expert.

programme.title: Movie: Detroit
programme.desc: After a police raid on an illegal bar set off the deadly 1967 Detroit riot, shots are heard coming from the Algiers Motel. When police, National Guardsmen and a private security guard respond three black men end up dead and several civilians are beaten.

programme.title: Movie: Men of Honor
programme.desc: A man is determined to become a navy diver in spite of the overwhelming obstacles in his way.

programme.title: Movie: Detroit
programme.desc: After a police raid on an illegal bar set off the deadly 1967 Detroit riot, shots are heard coming from the Algiers Motel. When police, National Guardsmen and a private security guard respond three black men end up dead and several civilians are beaten.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Pardon My Scotch
programme.desc: The best shorts from these American comedy icons.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Three Missing Links
programme.desc: The best shorts from these American comedy icons.

programme.title: The Three Stooges: Violent Is the Word for Curly
programme.desc: The Stooges pose as professors at Mildew College.

programme.title: Movie: Twins
programme.desc: Years after they were separated at birth, a genetically engineered fraternal twin goes to Hollywood to find his brother.

programme.title: Movie: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: After hearing voices, a farmer constructs a mystical baseball diamond in his cornfield. To his surprise, deceased members from the Chicago Black Sox come to the field to play baseball.

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A displaced and naïve teenager is taught karate in order to defend himself against trained bullies.

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: Miyagi returns to his homeland with Daniel to visit his dying father and confront old foes.

programme.title: Movie: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: When five very different students report to a Saturday morning detention, they come to find that they actually have more in common than they had originally thought.

programme.title: Movie: The Great Debaters
programme.desc: Based on a true story, an East Texas debate squad train to compete and take on the Harvard debate team.

programme.title: Movie: 42
programme.desc: Explores the life of American legend Jackie Robinson and his career with the Brooklyn Dodgers.

programme.title: Movie: Fences
programme.desc: In 1950s Pittsburgh, a former Negro League player works as a waste collector to provide for his family. Struggling to keep his family afloat, he takes his frustrations out on his wife and son. He realizes he has to face his regrets for his family.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Big Four-Oh
programme.desc: Vivian becomes obsessed with achieving her lifelong dream of being a professional dancer.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: She Ain't Heavy
programme.desc: Will meets a girl whom he likes, but is ashamed to take her out because of her weight.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Cased Up
programme.desc: Philip defends Will when he is involved in a car accident with Hilary's boyfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Hi-Ho Silver
programme.desc: Will and Carlton suspect the neighbours of stealing the family's heirloom silverware.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Butler Did It
programme.desc: Will and the children rent the house out to a production company for a music video shoot.

programme.title: Martin: Got to Be There
programme.desc: Martin drives 500 miles to try and catch Gina being unfaithful on a business trip.

programme.title: Martin: Beat It
programme.desc: Martin gets frustrated from the constant interruptions when he invites a group over to watch a boxing match.

programme.title: Martin: Baby, It's You
programme.desc: Martin agrees to host a baby shower for Gina's expecting friend at his apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Workin' Day and Night
programme.desc: Stan, Tommy and Cole convince Martin that Gina controls his life. To prove them wrong, he starts working double shifts at the radio station, which is exactly what Gina didn't want.

programme.title: Martin: Control
programme.desc: When Gina accidentally throws out Martin's basketball tickets, she tries to get replacement tickets from Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend
programme.desc: A jealous Martin scares away Gina's new male friend, but he regrets his actions when Gina forces him to go shopping with her.

programme.title: Martin: To Kill a Talking Bird
programme.desc: An accident happens when Martin and Gina are caring for Mama Payne's beloved parrot.

programme.title: Martin: Fat Like Dat

programme.title: Martin: Hollywood Swinging (Part 2)
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, Martin takes steps to ensure that he gets on Varnel Hill's talk show.

programme.title: Martin: Thanks for Nothing

programme.desc: Pam challenges Gina and Martin to see if they can abstain from having sex for two weeks.

programme.title: Martin: Holiday Blues
programme.desc: Gina is homesick at Christmas time.

programme.desc: When Martin's CD Walkman disappears, he accuses all of his good friends of taking it.

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)
programme.desc: With Gina out of his life, Martin reconsiders his decision to let her go to New York to move on with her life, and he sets out to win her back.

programme.title: Martin: Arms Are for Hugging
programme.desc: Martin and Gina admit that they are fighting and arguing too much, so they seek the help of a church Minister for counselling.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill
programme.desc: After winning a charity boxing match, Martin thinks he is as good a fighter as anyone. After Tommy Hearns makes advances towards Gina, Martin challenges the boxer to a 10-round grudge match.

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: Martin: I Don't Have the Heart
programme.desc: Pam starts dating an older, wealthy man who eventually asks her to marry him.

programme.title: Martin: Crunchy Drawers
programme.desc: Martin has a dream in which he's attracted to Pam.

programme.title: Martin: No Love Lost
programme.desc: A fight between Martin and Gina before their engagement party threatens the evening.

programme.title: Martin: The Hoe Down in Motown
programme.desc: When the IRS busts Stan, he is forced to sell the radio station. When the new owner takes over, he turns it into a country and western station, and Martin tries to adapt.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Wild 'N Out Veterans vs. Rookies/ Maino
programme.desc: DC Young Fly captains a special Wild 'N Out Veterans vs the Rookies episode. They compete in games - Remix, Breaking Up Is Hard To Do, Shooting Blanks, and the Wildstyle battle. Maino performs.

programme.title: Nick Cannon Presents: Wild 'N Out: Montell Jordan / Montel Williams
programme.desc: Nick Cannon, Montel Williams and Montell Jordan battle it out in games: Jokin’ Word, Got Props, R & Beef and the Wildstyle battle. Montell Jordan performs.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: When her high school boyfriend, a superstar baseball player, returns to town, a single-parent finds the inspiration to reinvent her struggling diner and revisits the past to find something even better for the future.

programme.title: Movie: A Summer Romance
programme.desc: A woman's ranch is her family's legacy, so, when a developer comes to town trying to buy it, she is not overly interested, that is, until he starts trying to win her trust, and her heart.

programme.title: Movie: Her Pen Pal
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with planning a Paris wedding for her best friend. When she learns her ex is invited, and bringing a date, she reconnects with an old childhood pen pal in France.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: A woman returns home to save her dad's annual fall festival on her family's pumpkin farm. While there, she runs into an old rival, and sparks fly.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami
programme.desc: On a Saturday night when Dorothy is the only one with a date, the other girls are prompted to reminisce about some of the worst dates they have ever had.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: Dorothy's discovery of Gloria sleeping with Stan just adds to their sibling rivalry. Meanwhile, Sophia has had it and leaves just prior the hurricane hitting.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Loves Miles
programme.desc: Rose has had it with Miles' penny pinching ways and decides to take Blanche's advice and go out with her and some big spenders. Meanwhile, Blanche has been left in charge of Sophia while Dorothy is away.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Room Seven
programme.desc: Sophia has an after-life experience, seeing her late husband in heaven, while choking on a piece of candy. Meanwhile, Blanche is distraught over the demolition of her grandmother's plantation, so the girls travel to Atlanta.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide VI: The Wrath of Stan
programme.desc: As associate producer of Wake Up Miami, Rose needs a hot news story for sweeps week.

programme.desc: Blanche tries to cheer up a lonely Dorothy by taking her out to her favourite bar.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: An ancient family curse requires Sophia to save Dorothy by performing strange tasks.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Midwinter Night's Dream
programme.desc: The full moon and festivities prompt strange happenings including Blanche's jewelry being swiped, Sophia trying to break a curse, and Dorothy and Miles sharing a passionate kiss.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose: Portrait of a Woman
programme.desc: Dorothy gives a speech at Career Day and is offered a job as a motivational trainer.

programme.title: Movie: A Summer to Remember

programme.title: Movie: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help run a bed and breakfast, along the way, she meets a handsome pilot.

programme.title: Movie: The Baker's Son
programme.desc: A man needs to find his true love to help turn the bread he makes from basic to extraordinary.

programme.title: Movie: All of My Heart: Inn Love
programme.desc: Brian and Jenny are engaged and preparing for the grand opening of their bed and breakfast, Emily's Country Inn. But when a big storm hits Bucks County, all their plans end up sopping wet.

programme.desc: The office staff prepares for a game of basketball against the workers in the warehouse.

programme.desc: The first of the Seven Deadly Sins book series. A woman about to marry the man of her dreams meets his best man and her whole world gets rocked.

programme.title: Movie: Envy: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: An only-child is thrilled to learn she has a half-sister. The half-sister, who grew up with nothing, wants her life and will do anything to get it.

programme.title: Movie: Betrayed by My Husband
programme.desc: A woman is devastated by the loss of her husband that is until she sees him alive. When her brother-in-law dies mysteriously, she is the chief suspect and must work quickly to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California was riddled with 10 arson fires in three weeks. When some evidence points to other fires further up north, the investigation widens and continues until a fingerprint is finally found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: A well-respected nurse in a small community dies in a car accident. Investigators suspect drunk driving, until test results come back showing no alcohol was ingested.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Big Easy Black Widow
programme.desc: In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, resources are depleted. When a Pastor turns up dead outside of his New Orleans apartment, his case, along with countless others, goes cold, until his wife's next husband turns up dead as well.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage

programme.title: Murder Nation: Blood on the Bayou: Southern Harm
programme.desc: When four seemingly unconnected women are murdered in their homes in Baton Rouge, LA, authorities go on the hunt for a serial killer. But when more murders happen 20 miles north, a small-town PD presents a theory contrary to the FBI’s.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of Disaster Park
programme.desc: A collection of ramshackle structures with a mystical facade lie mysteriously deserted on the tropical island of Bali. Experts investigate and uncover the ruins of a bizarre amusement park complex with a disastrous past.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Mr. Bad Guy
programme.desc: In Southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of Teal Season. Later, a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs and a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Blind Rage
programme.desc: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search and rescue mission for a missing fisherman. Agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Deer in the Headlights
programme.desc: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer. Agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds, and health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Spy in the Sky
programme.desc: While using the LDWF's 'spy-in-the-sky' drone, Agents track down a boat captain breaking the law in Plaquemines Parish. A family of shrimpers is investigated for pulling oversized nets, and two feuding fishermen are suspected of being under the influence.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Road Killer
programme.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway. Meanwhile, Agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills, duck hunters are confronted for harassment and a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Monster Crabber
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, Wildlife Agents protect the state's resources. A crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer, and Agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Deer in the Headlights
programme.desc: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer. Agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds, and health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Spy in the Sky

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Running with Rivals
programme.desc: Arch rivals the Dirty 7 and Team Georgia faces off to see who truly is the best Mega Truck racing team in the land. But tensions quickly rise when the season's frustrations begin to boil over.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Powerboat Crash, Train vs. Truck
programme.desc: A powerboat breaks up during a race; a train plows through a pick up truck; a plane crashes during a test flight.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Guatemala Sailfish
programme.desc: Jimmy targets sailfish.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Salmon on Restigouche River
programme.desc: We're chasing Atlantic Salmon on Canada's Restigouche River.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Key West, FL Keys: Hammering the Gulf Wrecks
programme.desc: George is fishing for wreck species into the Gulf north of Key West.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: If This Boat Could Talk
programme.desc: Ali and Rush fish with David Salazar at Casa Vieja Lodge on the newest addition to the fleet.

programme.title: Into the Blue: Key West Cobias
programme.desc: Captains Steve Rodger and Scott Walker join each other for adventurous and raucous trips.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience
programme.desc: Captains Tom Rowland and Rich Tudor share their knowledge of inshore and offshore fishing.

programme.title: Sportsman's Adventures: Marathon Madness in the Florida Keys
programme.desc: Rick and Ridge are fishing for tuna and kingfish with Capt. Chris Trosset in the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Cal Fire: Mountain of Flame
programme.desc: The Creek Fire, set to become the most destructive fire in California history, ignites in the Sierras and forces the rescue of campers trapped by flames. Chief Walker and crews battle the Valley fire that threatens hundreds of homes.

programme.title: Cal Fire: Blaze Brotherhood
programme.desc: Fire season intensifies with the El Dorado Fire that takes the life of a firefighter. A major structure inferno erupts and quickly becomes a five-alarm blaze. Rookie firefighters are trained to become hand crews as resources are drained on other fires.

programme.title: Cal Fire: Napa Burning
programme.desc: In a major escalation of fire season, multiple blazes tear through Napa as firefighters scramble to protect ancient redwood forests and dozens of wineries. Cal Fire's Honor Guard pays tribute to a fallen firefighter.

programme.title: Cal Fire: The Devil's Wind
programme.desc: Cal Fire races to put down neighborhood fires in Southern California before they're fanned by the famed Santa Ana winds. When the winds strike with a vengeance, crews battle a tragic memory of the past as two big blazes escalate quickly.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Stars Against the Storm
programme.desc: All-Star survivalists Wes and Suzänne take on Ecuador's relentless rainforest. Aggressive pumas, venomous snakes and constant storms make every step dangerous. Even these veterans are not prepared for the shocking news that shakes their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: EJ's Ball and Pain
programme.desc: A brutal injury threatens EJ's challenge and manhood. Jeff and Steven are stalked by a territorial black bear. Rylie, Matt and Ryan land their second huge win of the challenge. Max and Gary plan a risky raid of an active beehive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: A Bridge Over Swampy Water
programme.desc: To cross the gator-filled swamp, Rylie, Matt and Ryan engineer an epic 50-foot bridge in a desperate attempt for resources. Harassed by a black bear, Jeff and Steven must abandon their camp. EJ stalks a gator who has been stealing his fish.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Tiny Monsters
programme.desc: Sherry's hoard has broken up her marriage and authorities are threatening to take away her children and condemn her home.

programme.title: Filth Fighter: Supersized: Filth Fighter
programme.desc: Sharon's family member left her home in ruins and she needs to sell it immediately. Tom created his own nightmarish hoard and is days from open-heart surgery. Christina works to clean up these dangerous situations before it's too late.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Runaway Bump, Never Coming Back?
programme.desc: Leonard has an alarming bump hanging off of his arm that looks like it's breaking through the skin. Brandon has several lumps on his head that makes him fearful for his life. Jess got a noticeable lump on her butt after falling down the stairs.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pain in the Neck
programme.desc: John fears the large lump on his neck could become so big that it may eventually suffocate him. Shoshana is depressed because of the big growth on her forehead. Ashley hopes Dr. Lee can provide some relief from her three painful skin conditions.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Cyster, Cyster

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Split Decision
programme.desc: Joanne has been held back from success because of her forehead growth. Shakisaha split her left earlobe after stretching it with gauges. Mike is a tough guy with a soft bump on his head. Dania's rhinophyma has kept her from enjoying her life.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Hobbitses, Physicses and a Ball With Zip
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to take a break from science when his new obsession with 'The Lord of the Rings' leads to an unhealthy habit.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Family Dynamics and a Red Fiero
programme.desc: Sheldon studies his family for a psychology project, and Thanksgiving dinner turns into a family fight when George Sr. is offered a job in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Financial Secret and Fish Sauce
programme.desc: When George Sr. asks Sheldon to keep a secret from Mary, the stress of not being honest drives Sheldon to hideout at Tam’s for his first sleepover.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Brisket, Voodoo and Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The kids brainstorm ways to resolve a family feud when Meemaw refuses to give George St. her brisket recipe.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Karen 2.0/ Inspongeiac
programme.desc: Plankton's wife is replaced by a better version at work; Spongebob can't sleep.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman and Barnacle Boy/ Pickles
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick's favourite superheroes are in a retirement home; Bob loses self-confidence.

programme.title: Nick News: Kids, Immigration and Equality
programme.desc: Children who have made an impact on real world issues are profiled.

programme.title: Young Dylan: My Fair Charlie
programme.desc: A family's world is upended when their nephew, an aspiring hip-hop star, moves in.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Destination Dinohenge
programme.desc: Go-getting reporter Amelia accompanies Ollie and his mom, Dr. Akana, to investigate the mysterious Dinohenge statues. They run into an evil warrior named Void Knight and a threat that puts the entire world in danger.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Doodle Dimension/ Moving Bubble Bass
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick become trapped in an alternate dimension where anything they draw comes to life. SpongeBob and Patrick help Bubble Bass move out of his mother's basement.

programme.title: Danger Force: Manlee Men
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Loud House: Deal Me Out/ Friendzy
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde worry that they may be too old to still be playing Ace Savvy. Lincoln discovers that having a friend over means getting special privileges and he takes advantage of that.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Mad Scientist/ Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: Don't You Fore-get About Me/ Tough Cookies
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Battle of the Grandpas/ Prankaversary
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Star is Scorned/ Senior Moment
programme.desc: When Lola realizes that double the cuteness could help her break into show business, she teams up with Lily. Lori regrets everything she hasn't done in high school, and vows to make up for lost time.

programme.title: The Loud House: Friends in Dry Places/ Coupe Dreams
programme.desc: While on a field trip, Lincoln worries that his friend group is splintering. In order to buy her dream car, Lori becomes a local rideshare driver.

programme.title: The Loud House: Love Birds/ Rocket Men
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde beg their parents to let them go to space cadets camp, but it's not as fun as they expected. After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection.

programme.title: The Loud House: On Thin Ice/ Room and Hoard
programme.desc: Lynn's sports superstitions cause chaos at a hockey match. Unable to part with their childhood toys, the kids try to convince Mom and Dad that they still play with them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Hurl, Interrupted/ Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret./ After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Incredible Shrinking Sponge/ Sportz?
programme.desc: SpongeBob must figure out how to do his job after accidentally shrinking himself. Squidward invents a new sport to get back at SpongeBob and Patrick for annoying him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Call the Cops/ Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back. Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Pictures, Please/ Stuck on the Roof
programme.desc: Patrick leads an enthusiastic stranger on a tour of his favorite places in Bikini Bottom. SpongeBob is afraid to get off the roof of the Krusty Krab, but he won't let that stop him from living his life.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whale Watching/ Krusty Kleaners
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs hires Squidward to babysit Pearl for the night, but she just wants to sneak out to a cool teen party. SpongeBob spills a milkshake during a delivery.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Snooze You Lose/ Krusty Katering
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick can't wake him up, but they won't let him miss his big audition.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Drive Happy/ Old Man Patrick

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Sir Prince of Darkness
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack's bucket lists collide when father and son head to the UK. While both want to visit Stonehenge, the mythic structure of Druid lore, the rest of their itinerary is up for debate, and both Ozzy and Jack each want their way.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Like Forefathers, Like Sons
programme.desc: Ozzy and Jack venture to historic Jamestown, Virginia. Jack is determined to find out whether any Osbournes were among the first British colonists in America, but Ozzy is obsessed with the idea that the early settlers resorted to cannibalism.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Like Father, Like Sun
programme.desc: At their Key West starting point, Ozzy and Jack do some deep-sea fishing, hunt pythons in the Everglades and drive by Mar-a-Lago, President Trump's Winter White House.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Texas, Bloody Texas
programme.desc: Jack and Ozzy are at odds over the broken RV, but they find a recreational way to let out their frustrations. Ozzy meets with a Texas-based Black Sabbath cover band, and the boys find themselves involved in a bizarre game of bingo.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Spicy In-Laws
programme.desc: Jack and Ozzy take a trip down to Cajun country, where Jack's in-laws live in Louisiana. In New Orleans, they take a trip down memory lane with an old family friend from Ozzy's early touring days.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Ozzy tries to persuade Jack to hit the road but Jack's new baby is due to be born and he can't leave LA. Ozzy and Jack conspire to convince his sister, Kelly to take the wheel if Jack has to stay behind.

programme.title: Ozzy and Jack's World Detour: New Kid on the Block
programme.desc: Ozzy and Kelly are frantically awoken in the middle of the night by a call from Jack that his new baby is going to be born tonight. They quickly pack up the RV and a very exhausted Ozzy and Kelly make their five hour trek back to LA.

programme.title: Biography: Mick Foley
programme.desc: Follow the career of Mick Foley, a 2013 WWE Hall of Fame inductee better known as 'Mankind.' He was a fan-favorite during WWE's 'Attitude Era.'

programme.title: Biography: Bret 'Hitman' Hart
programme.desc: Follow the career of Bret Hart, one of the greatest technical athletes in WWE history, earning him nicknames such as 'The Hit Man.'

programme.title: The Cube: Talk to Me Nice
programme.desc: The world's toughest game show continues. This week, host Dwyane Wade steps back into the arena to help husband and wife team Kal and Whitney beat The Cube for a chance to win $250,000.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Find out why Q messed with a fishmonger at Fairway instead of a shopper, what nearly caused Sal to lose it during his UFO presentation and how the crew nabbed close ups from inside the mob during Q's punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: It's Electric
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: It's Electric
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Opa!
programme.desc: With only days left on the vacation, Scott finally shows up to Greece. Kendall feels like she’s being left out of the family fun and is missing out on a bonding experience with Brody.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All Signs Point to North
programme.desc: Kim needs to deliver earlier than planned, Kris prepares the house for her new granddaughter's arrival, Brody gives Bruce advice on a new friendship, and Khloe tries to make peace with what's happening in her life.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 1
programme.desc: The family hears about a surprise Kanye is planning for Kim's birthday. Kris goes into panic mode when she learns Kim's house is delayed and Kourtney and Khloé plot revenge on judgmental Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 2
programme.desc: The family gathers in San Francisco to surprise Kim on her birthday but the real surprise is Kanye proposing to Kim. Meanwhile, Scott heads to New York to spend time with his father and sick mother.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rocking the Cradle
programme.desc: When Kourtney surprises Scott with unexpected news of a third child on the way, Scott shuts down and tries to run away. Meanwhile, as Kim races to get the final details of her wedding in check, she runs into major drama with Brody.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim's Journey to the Altar
programme.desc: Kim and Kanye take their closest friends and family on an intimate, behind the scenes adventure from Paris to Italy, and through the whirlwind of days and events leading up to their exquisite wedding.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: About Bruce (Part One)
programme.desc: Bruce and the family share their raw, emotional feelings and conversations about Bruce's decision to live publicly as the woman he has always been on the inside, in the hopes that other families on a similar journey will know that they are not alone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: About Bruce (Part Two)
programme.desc: Bruce and the family share their raw, emotional feelings and conversations about Bruce's decision to live publicly as the woman he has always been on the inside, in the hopes that other families on a similar journey will know that they are not alone.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vanity Unfair
programme.desc: When Caitlyn comes out in her first big magazine interview and says things the family considers hurtful, Kim does what she can to pick up the pieces. Meanwhile, Khloé must decide how much emotional support she can afford to give to Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: That Was Then This Is Now
programme.desc: Caitlyn is receiving a special award at the ESPYs, but with Kris still sore over public comments Caitlyn made about their marriage, the daughters must find a way to support Caitlyn while still being sensitive to Kris's feelings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Great Kris
programme.desc: Follow the one-of-a-kind family as well as their group of celebrity pals.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A New York Family Affair
programme.desc: Kanye invites the entire family to NYC for his fashion show, but Khloé is torn over whether Lamar can handle such a big first appearance since his accident. Meanwhile, Kim tries to keep Scott busy in NYC, and Lamar meet Caitlyn for the first time.

programme.title: Rob and Chyna: Are You Still Texting B#@tches?
programme.desc: In the series premiere, Rob and Chyna are planning their new lives together as parents until suspicions on either side lead to Rob moving out of the house.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is eager to experience Paris Fashion Week with Kim and see Kendall walk the runway for the first time, but their trip to the city of love takes a dark turn when Kim is robbed at gunpoint.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Aftermath
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Paris incident, Kim struggles to cope with frightening reminders of the robbery, Kendall wrestles over her decision to prosecute an unstable trespasser, and Kris makes it her mission to heighten security for the entire family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Trippin' Part One
programme.desc: After Kim busts Scott with a girl in Dubai, the family is surprised Kourtney allowed him on the family trip to Costa Rica. The sisters discover Scott has invited yet another girl to join him in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Bun in the Oven
programme.desc: Khloé has some big news to share with her family, but her strained relationship with Corey threatens to overshadow the big reveal. Meanwhile, Kris gets a complex about her sagging earlobes.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Photo Shoot Dispute
programme.desc: A fight over the family Christmas card escalates into a major feud between Kourtney, Kim, and Khloé. Meanwhile, Scott feels guilty for moving on to a new relationship.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: Kourtney ponders taking a holiday during the holidays to get away from non-stop fighting with her sisters. Khloé tries to avoid the public eye until it's time for her pregnancy announcement. Kris is worried that she's being poisoned.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Khloé is blindsided by some devastating news about her relationship just days before her due date. Meanwhile, Kim worries that Khloe's delivery will fall on the day of her high school reunion, and Scott and Kendall team up to do some extreme sports.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: True Story
programme.desc: The family rushes to Cleveland to be by Khloé's side while she gives birth and comes face to face with Tristan for the first time since news of his infidelity broke. Kim reconnects with old friends at her 20-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Chopped: Grill Masters Napa: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Four champion grill masters are each already $10,000 richer, and now they return to see who will claim $50,000 more! Half of the appetizer basket is taken up with a porky surprise.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Meat
programme.desc: Guy's digging into a meat lover's paradise. In Colorado Springs, a Jamaican joint dishes out killer curry goat and jammin' jerk chicken. In Baltimore, a funky beer bar serves up wild boar sliders and outrageous pork belly mac and cheese fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homeland Favorites
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's celebrating homeland favorites from all kinds of diverse cultures. In Richfield, Minn., the Mexican restaurant-market combo dishing out real-deal tacos al pastor and carnitas tamales.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Celebrity Chefs
programme.desc: On this menu, there's killer cavatelli from Alex Guarnaschelli, Brooke Williamson's seafood roll, shrimp and sticky rice from Beau MacMillan, G. Garvin's short rib ragu and Buddy Valastro's famous lobster tail pastries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Vikings to Wings
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into Scandinavian, Persian and an Asian spin on wings. A vintage food truck in Portland, OR., rolling out wraps stuffed with Norwegian specialties, and, in Sunrise, Fla., authentic Iranian cuisine like chicken pomegranate stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef Bonanza
programme.desc: This time around, Guy Fieri's diving into a serious beef bonanza! In Wilmington, Delaware, there's a 1940s Italian family spot that's making beef braciole and meaty ravioli from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Alaskan Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads to Fairbanks for an Alaskan culinary adventure. There's authentic German specialties at a super funky food truck, a food-and-music jamfest featuring Cuban favorites and a local hot spot servin' up comfort with meatball subs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Righteous Bites
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is enjoying dishes from both sides of the pacific. In Los Angeles, he's trying a fat Jerry Sammy and a number of fried favorites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Port to Port
programme.desc: Guy's going from Portsmouth, New Hampshire to Portland, Ore. for righteous coast-to-coast flavor. In Oregon, a Spanish spot serving outrageous octopus and an homage to the chef's childhood.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting some families keeping it real in the kitchen in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sauced and Spiced
programme.desc: Guy heads to Tennessee for a traditional Mediterranean lamb dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza Plus
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into the pie and other major mouthfuls. In Boston, a joint putting beer into their crust and then topping it with taco fixins and a steak-and-cola combo.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Daddy's Famous Stew
programme.desc: Trisha teaches her nephews their granddaddy's (her daddy's) famous Brunswick stew recipe.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Our Guys' Favorites!
programme.desc: In honor of the amazing men and fathers in their lives, Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, cook up a few of their favorite dishes, including their daddy's biscuits and sausage gravy, and Garth's personal creation, taco pizza.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Payback Day
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is rewarding her hardworking crew for standing by as she and her guests have eaten their way through more than 500 dishes on Valerie's Home Cooking.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Backyard Beach Party
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli has enjoyed many wonderful summer meals on the shores of the Pacific, and she's welcoming the warm weather with an Italian-style backyard beach party with her family.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Well Done, Dad
programme.desc: Ree brings her dad a celebration meal with all of his favorite foods. A luxurious, slow-cooked burgundy beef stew, creamy cheese grits casserole and super-tasty blistered green beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Way Things Used To Be
programme.desc: Ladd and his father, Chuck, are out feeding cattle on the ranch, sharing stories about the old days and looking forward to a slap-up cowboy spread prepared by Ree Drummond. She's mixing up a fabulous PW steak rub to sprinkle over juicy breakfast steaks.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dad's Dinner Delivery
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her son, Todd, are delivering dinner to her dad and stepmom, so Ree makes an Italian meal of creamy chicken cacciatore soup, parmesan herb drops biscuits and Italian salad with parmesan crisps.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Film Crew Takeout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks food for her kid crew to take home after a busy day of filming. She makes Alex's veggie packed burritos, Mauricio's tortilla soup, Paige's s'mores brownies and Stu's baked BBQ ribs.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Nick's the Man!
programme.desc: For Father's Day, Molly Yeh is whipping up the creamiest, most-decadent dishes around. She's making saucy chicken alfredo lasagna, toasted ravioli salad with a creamy marinara ranch and, for dessert, chocolate dipped strawberry krumkake cannoli.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Late-Night Feedings (For New Mom and Dad)
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is sending a care package to Duff Goldman and his wife, Johnna, to celebrate the arrival of their baby. She makes quinoa, sweet potato and black bean bowls with parsley yogurt dressing and no-bake chocolate peanut butter bars.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Shoebox Memories
programme.desc: Trisha and Beth take a trip down memory lane as they go through mom and dad's shoebox of recipes. They pull out comforting recipes to cook, such as company chicken, Mama's scalloped potatoes and wild scuppernong pie with cinnamon swirl.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Family Favorites with Allie Colleen
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's daughter, Allie, joins her in the kitchen to learn some tips and tricks as they breathe new life into some favourite childhood dishes.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Cook-Out of Control!
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are amping up summer foods for an epic summer celebration. Their cookout menu includes triple decker burgers with roasted vegetables and cheese sauce, lobster roll panzanella and a grilled biscuit sundae with peaches and blueberries.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his talented chef friends to take a burger beyond the basic patty and bun. Antonia Lofaso combines sirloin and brisket with braised oxtail for an intensely meaty burger and whips orange juice for a crisp Garibaldi cocktail.

programme.title: BBQ Brawl: Flay vs. Symon vs. Jackson: Introduce Your 'Cue
programme.desc: A new crop of barbecue pitmasters step onto the scene and introduce themselves through their food. Captains Bobby Flay, Michael Symon and Eddie Jackson choose their teams and get ready for their first no-limits team battle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: West Coast Cookin'
programme.desc: Guy goes to Cali for a mouth watering variety of killer cuisine.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Signal
programme.desc: Gumball develops a strange stutter, and it makes him accidentally offend Darwin.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Schooling
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin take on Larry's jobs for 5 minutes and realize how bad it is.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Intelligence
programme.desc: Technology reaches human intelligence then becomes dysfunctional as it picks up human flaws.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Girlfriend

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Night
programme.desc: As night falls in Elmore, the Moon takes us on a tour through the various dreams -- and nightmares -- of the town’s slumbering inhabitants. Each character's dream shows us their innermost desires, their greatest fears, or just how plain weird they are.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Parasite
programme.desc: Anais has made a new friend, but Gumball and Darwin aren’t sure their relationship is equal.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Misunderstandings
programme.desc: Gumball thought he and Penny were meeting for dinner but they were actually meeting for lunch at a Diner called Dinner. He runs to the mall but everyone he meets on the way seems to misunderstand him in a different way.

programme.title: Family Guy: Eight Simple Rules for Buying My Teenage Daughter

programme.title: Family Guy: Breaking Out Is Hard to Do
programme.desc: When Lois is short on cash and can't pay her grocery bill, she resorts to stealing. The adrenalin rush from shoplifting sends her on a stealing spree that spirals out of control and leaves her behind bars.

programme.title: Home Movies: Bad Influences

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Slip

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Father

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Job

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Diet

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Possession

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Master
programme.desc: The Wattersons play a fantasy role-playing board game to resolve their differences.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Prank
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin's harmless pranks on Dad spiral hopelessly out of control.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Laziest
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin challenge Dad to a 'lazy-off.'

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Itch to Explore
programme.desc: When Craig sets out to map the entire creek, he and his friends end up in the treacherous Poison Ivy Grove.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Escape from Family Dinner
programme.desc: There's a huge water balloon fight at the creek but Craig is stuck at home for a family dinner, unless he can escape.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Monster in the Garden
programme.desc: Craig is determined to catch the monster that has been wreaking havoc in Granddad's garden.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Vulture's Nest
programme.desc: Craig and his friends start a band, but Craig is haunted by a frightening nightmare.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Climb

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Kid From 3030
programme.desc: The kids meet a mysterious kid from the future and try to help him complete his mission.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Power Punchers
programme.desc: Fed up with losing in video games to his Dad, Craig seeks training in the Creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Dinner at the Creek

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Sour Candy Trials
programme.desc: Craig goes on a mind-bending journey as he tries to eat the most sour candy in the Creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Fort Williams
programme.desc: Craig and his mom build the biggest blanket fort in the world.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Cousin of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig takes his cousin, Bryson, to the Creek, and accidentally starts a water balloon war.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Ancients of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig Williams and his two friends, Kelsey Pokoly and John Paul 'J.P.' Mercer, have their many adventures in the titular creek, described as a kid utopia of untamed wilderness in which tribes of children reign over tree forts and dirt bike ramps.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Craig and the Kid's Table
programme.desc: It’s a Williams Family Thanksgiving, which means it’s time to reunite The Kid’s Table! But when Bernard accidentally destroys dessert, Craig uses the power of the Kids Table to help save his brother from certain grounding.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: In the Key of the Creek
programme.desc: During a rainy day, Craig uses his toys to create a Creek adventure.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Children of the Dog
programme.desc: Craig has spent years trying to get his parents to get him a dog with no avail, but a charismatic creek kid may be able to help him get his dream dog.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Jessica Shorts
programme.desc: Five shorts following Craig's little sister Jessica as she tries to become the best at video games, experiences losing a tooth, creates a T.V show, saves a sword, and takes family game night too seriously.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Craig of the Beach
programme.desc: Craig hits the beach with his friends and family, but starts to worry his father is more fun than him.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: The Other Side: The Tournament
programme.desc: To win his dad a special prize, Craig enlists the help of his friends to compete in a tournament with the Other Side of the Creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Trick or Creek
programme.desc: Follow Craig as he leads his best friends on comical journeys by their neighborhood creek.

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Brother Builder
programme.desc: As Craig races against time to build a super important invention, we learn how Craig became such a clever inventor!

programme.title: Craig of the Creek: Body Swap
programme.desc: Fed up with their home experiences, Craig, Kelsey and JP agree to switch bodies!

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Spoon
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin are unwitting accomplices in a gas station robbery.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Authority
programme.desc: Granny JoJo's overprotective behaviour puts the Wattersons in danger.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Man
programme.desc: Dad tries to ban Granny Jojo from seeing her new boyfriend.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Money
programme.desc: The Wattersons have run out of money and are torn between being broke and selling out. Richard has lost all of the family’s money. Nicole is happy for the Wattersons to appear in a Joyful Burger commercial for some much needed cash.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Routine
programme.desc: Dad spends the day alone and the secrets of his daily routine are revealed.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Return

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside
programme.desc: The family goes to visit Richard's dad. Based on his basic living standards and extended absence from Richard's life, they assume Frankie must have done a stretch in the slammer. When he visits, they decide to turn their house into a prison.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Choices

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Menu

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Heist
programme.desc: Richard discovers that going into a bank whilst wearing a motorcycle helmet can land you in a lot of trouble.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Lady

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Deal

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If They Do Go Either Way They're Usually Fake
programme.desc: Judith is upset when she learns that Jake has seen a tattoo on a surfer's nude behind. Alan grows suspicious when Judith and the surfer become good friends. Charlie teaches Jake about the difference between real breasts and implants.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Twenty-Five Little Pre-Pubers Without a Snootful
programme.desc: When Alan and Judith argue during a rehearsal for Jake's play, Charlie is stuck handling a roomful of fourth graders by himself. Charlie then uses his jingle-writing experience to craft the play -- with an interesting outcome.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Phase One, Complete
programme.desc: Charlie is uncomfortable when his latest romantic conquest befriends both Jake and Evelyn. Alan gets too competitive when playing a board game with Rose.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Merry Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Charlie tries to win back a former flame by hosting a large Thanksgiving dinner with his family.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ate the Hamburgers, Wearing the Hats
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by selecting their crazy cousins as Jake's legal guardians in case of emergency. When Jake suffers an injury, Charlie races to prove he can be a responsible guardian.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Just Like Buffalo
programme.desc: When Jake imitates one of Charlie's sexist remarks, Judith's support group decides that Charlie's home is an unfit environment for the child. Charlie is forced to cajole the group into letting Jake continue to spend the weekends at his place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go Get Mommy's Bra
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to trade cars with his mother for a day and ends up with major regrets.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Eat Human Flesh With Wooden Teeth?
programme.desc: A stressed Judith goes to Hawaii, leaving Jake with Alan and Charlie for an entire week.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Weekend in Bangkok With Two Olympic Gymnasts
programme.desc: When Charlie agrees to watch Jake for the weekend, he quickly realizes that Jake's idea of a good time is going out for fast food and video games, which is quite different from his own ideas of fun.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: It Never Rains in Hooterville
programme.desc: When Jake starts covering his walls with posters of sexy women, Alan feels pressure to make the most of what little childhood his son has left. Meanwhile, Kandi embarks on a new career as an actress.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Large Birds, Spiders and Mom
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan ignorantly try to prepare Jake for his first day of junior high, but may wind up traumatizing him instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Is There a Mrs. Waffles?

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Undercover Brother

programme.desc: Christine realizes that one reckless evening may have jeopardized her chance to begin dating Mr. Harris.

programme.desc: Sophia organizes a band to raise money, volunteers at the hospital and battles return policies at the supermarket.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert, King of Cobras
programme.desc: Robert follows in Steve's steps wrangling Utah, a highly venomous 12-foot king cobra. Dr. Amber visits Tandora to care for wild Koalas. Back at the Zoo, an old injury flares up for Bruce the Brolga, a bird who's been in the Irwin's care for 26 years.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Season 3 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Steve Irwin's family carry on his legacy as they run the Australian Zoo.

programme.desc: After historical wildfires rip through Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri jump in to help the severely injured koala population, while Bindi and the wildlife hospital rescue hundreds of baby flying foxes.

programme.desc: Bindi and the family plan an emotional surprise for Terri in the Crocoseum. Chandler must step up during the croc show, while Robert gets hands-on with the zoo's newest members: three adorable tiger cubs.

programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Steve's Croc Mission Lives On
programme.desc: The family makes their annual trip to the Steve Irwin Wildlife Reserve to capture, study and release wild crocodiles. They continue the mission started by Steve & Terri, providing scientific research vital to the protection of Australia's apex predators.

programme.desc: After historical wildfires rip through Australia, the Irwins race to rescue as many animals as possible. Robert and Terri jump in to help the severely injured koala population, while Bindi and the wildlife hospital rescue hundreds of baby flying foxes.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Needle in a Haystack

programme.title: North Woods Law: Twists and Turns
programme.desc: Officer McDermott finds an abandoned truck, sparking a winding investigation. Officer Holmes and Sgt. Lucas rescue paddlers of a capsized canoe. Later, Holmes responds to a moose accident, while OFC. Frye consoles a bereft woman.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Running Out of Time
programme.desc: The wardens, the National Guard, and dozens of volunteers team up in a massive, days-long search for a hiker missing in the vast wilderness of the White Mountains. And, the wardens take on some familiar faces in a charity softball game.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trail Blazers
programme.desc: A deer hunter pleads ignorance when caught with tree stands on private property. Officer Crouse catches a group of ATV speedsters, and Officer MacFazden investigates a suspicious bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cracking a Cold Case
programme.desc: Officer Canfield handles a group of ATV riders reported for riding prohibited trails. Officer Holmes investigates a suspected illegal deer kill, and an abandoned car is found on the Androscoggin River that might be linked to a crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cliff Face Crisis
programme.desc: A horrific rock climbing accident on Cannon Cliffs sends two officers and an emergency team on a heroic helicopter rescue mission. A combative man is found illegally ridding an OHRV and is questioned by Officer Crouse, and a moose causes a traffic jam.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Season 8 Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Follow Maine's elite game-warden service as they work during hunting season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Trapped

programme.title: BET Her Presents: Queen Collective: Game Changer
programme.desc: Tanya Depass, a lifelong Chicagoan and African-American gamer, fights to make gaming better and more inclusive for everyone including people like her.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty: Paradise Lost
programme.desc: The good fortune of the Whiskers comes to a sudden end when history repeats itself with terrifying consequences for Swift. Meanwhile pregnant Flint leads Hakuna Matata home only to be confronted by local land-grabbers.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Making of
programme.desc: This stunning series examines critical environmental and conservation issues.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Yellowstone
programme.desc: In 1985, wolves were released back into Yellowstone National Park. The re-introduction of the predator has set off a cascade of events through the food chain.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Amazon
programme.desc: Steven Backshall investigates what make the Amazon so diverse. He looks at the nutrient poor nature of the rainforest and discusses the strategies used by the life in the jungle to make the most of the little nutrients available.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: July-August: A Time of Migration
programme.desc: With the Arctic ice sheets falling, and the summer melt beginning July brings dramatic natural shifts.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: September-October: A Time of Activation
programme.desc: As the Northern Hemisphere turns to autumn, Australia comes back to life and the mating humpbacks fill the warming tropical waters of Tonga.

programme.title: A Wild Year on Earth: November-December: Full Circle
programme.desc: From the millions of Monarch butterflies that collect in Mexico, to the deep fog of Dubai, November brings beautiful signals of winter.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Enchanted Kingdom

programme.desc: When Dianne Hart and Donnie Rudd begin an affair in a small Chicago suburb, Dianne's kids hope that their mom has found love. But instead it triggers a series of bizarre lies and deceptions that reveal a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Hustlers
