programme.title: Jessica Chambers: An ID Murder Mystery: Flames in the Night
programme.desc: The brutal murder of 19-year-old Jessica Chambers, found severely burned on the side of the road in rural Courtland, Mississippi, sends shock waves across the nation as the twisting and turning hunt for her killer creates a rift in her community.

programme.title: Jessica Chambers: An ID Murder Mystery: Justice for Jessica
programme.desc: As the trial unfolds in the fiery murder of 19-year-old Jessica Chambers, a shocking turn of events threatens to tear apart her family and the community. But everything changes when another brutal crime is discovered in Louisiana.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Sour Grapes
programme.desc: Two women with a shared wall between their townhouses become increasingly volatile with each other as their once good relationship disintegrates. Food fights, physical altercations, and mutual vandalism will finally come to a bloody climax.

programme.title: Jessica Chambers: An ID Murder Mystery: Flames in the Night
programme.desc: The brutal murder of 19-year-old Jessica Chambers, found severely burned on the side of the road in rural Courtland, Mississippi, sends shock waves across the nation as the twisting and turning hunt for her killer creates a rift in her community.

programme.title: Jessica Chambers: An ID Murder Mystery: Justice for Jessica
programme.desc: As the trial unfolds in the fiery murder of 19-year-old Jessica Chambers, a shocking turn of events threatens to tear apart her family and the community. But everything changes when another brutal crime is discovered in Louisiana.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: This Bullet's for You
programme.desc: A couple from Michigan realizes a long held dream when they relocate to Florida, but their life in the sun is destroyed when they get into a fatal conflict with their neighbour.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gone in the Night
programme.desc: A couple wakes up to find their baby's crib empty. They are certain she has been kidnapped. But many believe the parents are the culprits.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bait and Kill
programme.desc: When Air Force veteran Michael Giles disappears from the quiet Dallas suburb of Garland, what appears to be a straightforward missing persons case quickly morphs into a jigsaw puzzle of mistaken identity, fraud, and murder.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Tainted Love
programme.desc: In the fall of 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd, and exposing a staggering, decades-long reign of terror and abuse.

programme.title: The Interrogator: Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: When two Yellow Cab drivers are murdered in under a week, the city of Houston is thrown into a frenzy. Detective Fil Waters soon learns that there are recordings of the same female voice luring the drivers to their deaths.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Buried at the Ranch
programme.desc: In Arlington, Texas, Michael Humphreys and Sandra Walton are brutally gunned down. Detectives don't know who the intended victim was but when they discover recordings of phone conversations with one of the victims, they get the break they need.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: No Mercy
programme.desc: A man is found murdered in what appears to be a home-invasion robbery. Closer inspection makes detectives believe it was a personal attack, and look for suspects, including his wife.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: He Didn't Have to Die
programme.desc: Eric Cates is found burned to death in his pickup truck. Police suggest suicide, but Eric's mother is convinced of foul play. Later, a motorist pursues Zach Lamb in a car chase and kills him in a violent confrontation.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Enemy Within
programme.desc: In a sleepy spot near Silicon Valley, high school boys are being harassed online by a new girl in town. Before long, secrets unfold that tear the community apart. But one mother has heard it all before and won't stop until justice is finally served.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tainted Love
programme.desc: When love turns to obsession, these women make their lover their possession.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: Cheating Death
programme.desc: Cathy thought she had found the man of her dreams in Peter Tobin. But by the time she discovered his dark secret, it was too late.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: Is This the Night I Die?
programme.desc: Cindy Best's friends and family all thought she was crazy when she told them her suspicion about her husband, Karl Karlsen. But Cindy was determined to take matters into her own hands and prove her husband was a killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: I Wish I'd Turned Around
programme.desc: Kat Harris and Marla Kreuger each loved Lawrence Harris in her own way. Each dismissed his dark obsession as childish and strange, but harmless. Neither of them realized he was preparing to sacrifice innocent lives for his evil purpose.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: Fear Thy Father
programme.desc: Charles Sexton was taught that his father, Eddie, was God. At first, he and his siblings were willing and loyal disciples, but as the family descended into madness, Charles discovered that in the Sexton family, crossing his parents meant death.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Donnie Brasco
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions - and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Meyer Lansky
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, let alone find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Bugsy Siegel
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Albert Anastasia

programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Iran Hostage Crisis: As We Watched
programme.desc: In this riveting hour we relive the high stakes drama of the Iran hostage crisis, from the terrifying moment when the American embassy is seized on November 4th, 1979, to the last minute negotiations that freed the hostages 444 days later.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Traditional Goes Ultra Modern
programme.desc: A couple and their young son are moving to Waco from Denver, Colorado, in hopes of finding a slower pace, big acreage and a whole lot of style. Chip and Jo transform a country home into the modern dream they're looking for.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Flip House to Family Project
programme.desc: Chip and Jo return to their roots and work to give a home a clean, new look, until Jo decides she wants her sister and brother-in-law to buy the house.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Ranch House to Modern Mediterranean Retreat
programme.desc: The Aguilar family wants to find a forever home that fits their family of four and reflects their personal style. With a total budget of $275,000, the Aguilars settle on a ranch house with plenty of opportunities.

programme.title: Mind for Design: What Is the 70/30 Rule?
programme.desc: A family room makeover is the task at hand for Brian Patrick Flynn and his team.

programme.title: Super Dad: Skate Ramp for Six

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Rock Star Renovation
programme.desc: Musician Mike Herrera and his wife, Holli, are moving from Washington state to Waco so they can be closer to Holli's family. They need a house with plenty of space for their two children and a large music studio for Mike.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Modern Cabin Makeover
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna team up with their friend Jimmy Don to transform a bland little house into a modern mountain cabin for his son. The project quickly turns into one of the most unique renovations yet with a little help from former first lady Laura Bush.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: New Chapter for Family of Four
programme.desc: The Jacksons need four bedrooms and three bathrooms that, ideally, can be renovated within their budget.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Camp on Two Ponds
programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wowing In Wildwood
programme.desc: A couple that's relocating from the Washington, DC, area to Wildwood, New Jersey, finds the perfect beach house for their family of five. It needs serious renovating, and while they have a big budget, they also have a big wish list.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: North Carolina Renewal
programme.desc: After a recent medical scare, Nicole is ready to live life to the fullest in a home by the water in Moorehead City, NC.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Good Ol' Reno in Gulf Shores, Alabama
programme.desc: A couple searches for a beachfront vacation spot in Gulf Shores, AL. They find a house in their dream location but the dated home needs a brand-new look to fit their colorful style.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Surfside Revive in Texas
programme.desc: A growing family finds a seaside fixer upper in Surfside Beach, Texas.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: True Grits: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown "reloads" an episode that has been bugging him for years. He finally comes to terms with grits and polenta while a certain Southern gentleman returns to teach the corniest bread of all.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Chuck for Chuck: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown finally 'reloads' the pot roast from 2001. He's learned a lot since then, and it shows, because this is what pot roast is supposed to be.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Cohen

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chicago
programme.desc: Ali Khan's Windy City expectations are as high as Chicago's Willis Tower, so his breakfast is a tower of fried chicken, biscuits, egg and bacon. For lunch, Ali dives into the city's unofficial sandwich, the Italian beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Fillin' Up in the South
programme.desc: Ali Khan hits the ground running in Richmond, Va., at a bakery that puts a spicy twist on a traditional Southern biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Brew Town? Food Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Milwaukee for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Sin City Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan is on the hunt for breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Santa Barbara Bargains
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Santa Barbara, Calif. He has a bacon and egg sandwich on a buttery brioche, bacon wrapped, fully loaded hot dogs, and a dairy-free "cowboy cookie," a local favourite.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chowin' Down in Cleveland
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Cleveland looking for irresistible breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals. He hits the ground hot with flapjacks topped with white chocolate mole with candied jalapenos.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: Three powerhouse chefs put their personalities on a plate in the Wildfire Round. The chefs try to cream their competition in the Crossfire Round, and the Feast of Fire is inspired by a good ol’ ranch style spread.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Serious Spice
programme.desc: Good food is the spice of life, and we're adding a little kick with our flavor-filled favourites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Dallas
programme.desc: Discover some of the hottest spots in Dallas, Texas, from brisket to fried chicken.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Charleston, South Carolina
programme.desc: Andrew steps beyond the carriage rides and stuffy plantation tours to see what really makes the Charleston food scene tick.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Baltimore and Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: There's a long line of tradition on the menu when Andrew visits Baltimore and the Chesapeake Bay.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the seafood lover's paradise of North Carolina's Outer Banks region. The unique location serves up dishes like blue crab, Hatteras clam chowder, baked oysters and other mouthwatering feasts born of the ocean.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Southern Comfort Foods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the comfort food of the South. He visits a historic cafe in Atlanta for fried chicken and a Memphis joint for ribs. Then he checks out biscuits in Nashville, frogmore stew near Charleston, SC, and shrimp and grits in Savannah.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Boston, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to historic Boston, Massachusetts, for some epic New England eats and a 4.5-pound Irish breakfast challenge at Flann O'Brien's Pub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.desc: Ollie carries out a plan to catch Sporix without his teammates’ knowledge. When monsters take advantage of his idea, Ollie realizes the benefit of working as a team.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Operation Dad
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne tries to convince her Dad to move to the city with the help of Sid.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Guilt Trip/ Short Cut
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and her primos try to win Maria a trip around the world./ When Carlota fails at hair cutting, she trains with the master barber himself – CJ.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Slink or Swim/ The Big Chill
programme.desc: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves. After begging Abuelo for A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Battle of the Grandpas/ Prankaversary
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Loud House: Suite and Sour/ Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids. When Lucy gets a crush on a 'normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: The Loud House: Really Loud Music
programme.desc: Luna contemplates whether she should go with a song that's true to her sound, or try to make something that the whole world will love just to win a song writing contest.

programme.title: The Loud House: Don't You Fore-get About Me/ Tough Cookies
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: The Loud House: A Grave Mistake/ Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy and Haiku compete to be the new president of the Young Mortician's Club at school. Leni worries about her friendship with Miguel and Fiona when she's promoted to temporary manager at work.

programme.title: The Barbarian and the Troll: The Queen Is Back
programme.desc: A troll who aspires to become a singer meets and joins a mighty warrior on her quest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sandy's Nutmare/ Bulletin Board
programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Good Krabby Name/ Move It or Lose It
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick advertise the Krusty Krab. Then, petitions are circulated to see which restaurant will get bulldozed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Restraining SpongeBob
programme.desc: Squidward gets a restraining order against SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become completely normal, and he begins to lose all his spongey-ness. SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone, even Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice
programme.desc: When SpongeBob finds a penny on the ground, Mr. Krabs becomes obsessed with having it in his possession. / SpongeBob tries to impress Mrs. Puff during a field trip to the Boating Museum.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sailor Mouth/ Artist Unknown
programme.desc: Bob learns a 'bad' word off of a dumpster; Bob is Squid's only student for an art class.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Curse of Savanti Romero
programme.desc: As the turtles get ready for Halloween, the city is invaded by strange monsters.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Crypt of Dracula
programme.desc: The turtles travel to Transylvania in order to stop Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Frankenstein Experiment
programme.desc: After recruiting Frankenstein's monster, Savanti releases all of the creatures into the 21st century.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Monsters Among Us
programme.desc: The turtles return, only to find a world run by monsters, and start to regret their own actions.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Wanted: Bebop and Rocksteady
programme.desc: When 80s Shredder and Krang appear in our dimension, they employ Bebop and Rocksteady and find their plans are succeeding better than ever.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Foot Walks Again
programme.desc: The Turtles must train their 80’s counterparts to face a greater threat than they’ve ever encountered.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Winning Attitude
programme.desc: Izzy is determined to win a big race with the help of her Special Olympics athlete cousin, Lily. After Lily misses a training session and Izzy rejects more help, her sportsmanship is put to the test.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Big Blow-Out
programme.desc: Leonardo, Donatello, Raphael, Michelangelo, and Splinter work to keep the city safe.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Going Overboard/ Walk Don't Run
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne finds out Tio Carlos was a famous skateboarder and gets him to teach her some moves. And, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business to buy a new skateboard.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Home Improvement/ Undivided Attention
programme.desc: Laird is nervous to host movie night at his house, so Ronnie Anne helps him pretend Arturo’s pad is his own!/ Carlota can’t seem to pay attention to anything but her phone, so Carlos sets her up – with a math tutor!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: An Udder Mess/ Teacher's Fret
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne wins two tickets to Dairyland – but has to choose between her besties Sid and Lincoln for the day. / When Ronnie Anne finds out her dad is dating her teacher, she teams with Sid to break them up ASAP.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: No Egrets/ Meal Ticket
programme.desc: Sergio is in for a treat when a group of baby birds think he’s their mama. Ronnie Anne and Sid help Casey run his family food truck… at the Yoon Kwan concert.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: How to Train Your Carl/ Stress Test
programme.desc: Carl gets lost in the zoo after sneaking away from his family to find a Komodo dragon. The family tries to help Bobby get over his test taking anxieties.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Kid Plays in the Picture/ Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: Carl’s love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career./ Frida’s art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Mexican Makeover/ Uptown Funk
programme.desc: With Mama Lupe coming to visit, Abuela tries to make sure her family represents their culture perfectly. Adelaide and Carl must work together on an adventure on Mr. Chang's route.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karate Chops/ Taco The Town
programme.desc: Used to being top dog, Carl can’t handle when Adelaide joins his karate class and becomes the star student./ Hector starts selling Rosa’s delicious tacos but gets overwhelmed when they’re more popular than the mercado!

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Walk Don't Run/ Croaked
programme.desc: In order to buy a new skateboard, Ronnie Anne and Sid start a dog-walking business that quickly gets out of hand. Then, Ronnie, Anne and Sid teach Adelaide about Day of the Dead to help her get over the death of her frog.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: I, Breakfast Bot/ Dynamic Do-Over
programme.desc: A multi-generational Mexican-American family run a market in a big city.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Karma Chameleon/ Team Effort
programme.desc: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Fool's Gold/ Flight Plan
programme.desc: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa’s gold./ Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl, Cj and Carlitos try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out of Toon/ Hail Doofania!
programme.desc: Boys create a cartoon and cast themselves as superheroes and the villain is Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween/ Face Your Fear
programme.desc: When Doof inherits a castle in Druselstein, Vanessa moves her Halloween party to the new digs; when Vanessa asks him to babysit her pet bat, Doof has to overcome his lifelong fear of bats.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Klimpaloon Ultimatum
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb must help Love Handel prove the existence of Klimpaloon, or else Love Handel will be barred from the world of fact-based song writing for all time.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Legend/ The Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia save a group of kids from a Dominator invasion as the kids tell stories about a mythic hero that sounds awfully familiar.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: Party Poopers/ Waste of Time
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia go from planet to planet helping people live free and have fun.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Hot Shot/ The Night Out
programme.desc: Wander and Sylvia go from planet to planet helping people live free and have fun.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Search for Captain Time/ The Heebie Jeebies
programme.desc: Lord Hater accidentally recruits a bloodthirsty alien hunter to help him find his missing pet. Wander and Sylvia search a creepy forest planet for a mystical power.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Sick Day/ The Sky Guy
programme.desc: Wander comes down with a cold and must depend on Sylvia to take on his many helping duties. Wander discovers a new species and accidentally exposes them to an entire new world.

programme.title: Wander Over Yonder: The Robomechabotatron/ The Flower
programme.desc: Wander must convince Sylvia, Hater and Peepers to work together to control an ancient giant robot. Sylvia scours the destroyed galaxy to save a rare flower and cheer up Wander.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax and Hiro
programme.desc: Hiro gives Baymax a battery boost chip upgrade.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Failure Mode
programme.desc: Hiro becomes demoralized when his latest school project fails spectacularly.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Beagle Birthday Breakout!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: Conquering the Ogre’s Dungeon!
programme.desc: In the end, Hyuga and Hikaru were no match for the legendary Blader Lui Shirosagi. Naturally, they both demand a rematch, but before the brothers can face Lui again, they have to conquer the Ogre’s Dungeon.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Surge: The Jet-Black Sun! Vex Lucius!
programme.desc: Lain’s Blading prowess seems to be the stuff of myth. But that doesn’t matter to Hyuga — he’s ready to go head-to-head anyway! When he does, he learns something incredible about Lain’s Bey, Vex Lucius.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ask a Foolish Question/ Misperceived Monotreme
programme.desc: When Candace discovers that Phineas and Ferb have invented a computer that can answer anything, she asks it how she can finally bust her brothers. Then, Perry misses his 100th battle against Doofenshmirtz to go to a charity pet wash with Candace.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doof 101/ Father's Day
programme.desc: Dr. Doofenshmirtz is sentenced to community service for being evil, and much to his daughter Vanessa's chagrin, he's assigned to teach science at her high school.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bad Hair Day/ Meatloaf Surprise
programme.desc: Candace gets a bad haircut and must rely on Phineas and Ferb's hair growing machine to correct it before she attends the Endangered Animal Benefit. Then, Mom joins Jamie Oliver as one of the judges for Danville's Meatloaf Festival Cook-Off.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Rats on a Train
programme.desc: The Lab Rats get their first mission to stop Davenport's hi-tech super fast train from speeding out of control. When they discover that Leo accidentally discarded the braking system they were supposed to install, they are forced to improvise.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Death Spiral Smackdown
programme.desc: Leo teams up with Adam in a school fitness challenge, hoping that Adam's bionic powers will be his secret weapon. But the plan backfires when they end up going head-to-head in the finals.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chore Wars
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase learn about chores and earn an allowance for the first time, then decide to host a yard sale to raise more money.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part One
programme.desc: Ezra inadvertently messes up one of Kanan's missions and is forced to escape with the crew of the Ghost in order to survive. The boys find out Kanan and his team are freedom fighters, and their next assignment is freeing Wookie prisoners.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion, Part Two
programme.desc: During his attempt to save the team from the Imperial trap, Ezra is captured by Agent Kallus. The rebels rescue the kid and set off on their original mission: to liberate the Wookiees destined for a terrible fate.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Droids of Distress
programme.desc: The rebels intercept a shipment of powerful weapons intended for the Empire, but the sale of the weapons doesn’t go according to plan when a frightened C-3PO calls the authorities.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Fighter Flight
programme.desc: Hera sends Ezra and Zeb into the city on a simple errand, but in a foolhardy stunt, the boys steal a TIE fighter instead. They wind up using the captured ship to free innocent prisoners en route to a labor camp.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Rise of the Old Masters
programme.desc: An underground broadcast reveals that the Empire is holding a Jedi Master prisoner. In a bold rescue attempt the crew of the Ghost voyages to the bleak prison world of Stygeon Prime only to fall into a trap engineered by the Inquisitor.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Breaking Ranks
programme.desc: Ezra infiltrates Lothal's Academy for Young Imperials, where the Empire identifies Force-sensitive children and indoctrinates the youths of Lothal into joining their ranks. With the help of cadet Zare Leonis, he gets vital information for the rebels.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Out of Darkness
programme.desc: Hera and Sabine take the Phantom to an abandoned asteroid base for resupply but become stranded there since the boys neglected to properly prepare the shuttle. Ravenous creatures attack while the Ghost crew scrambles to extract them.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Empire Day
programme.desc: On Empire Day, a government-mandated celebration of the founding of the Empire, an old friend of Ezra's parents, Tseebo, seeks help from the crew to escape off world with important Imperial information.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Gathering Forces
programme.desc: To draw the Imperials away from Tseebo, Kanan lures the Inquisitor to a planet filled with dangerous creatures. In the heat of battle, Ezra taps into his growing abilities with the Force allowing the Phantom to flee.

programme.title: Star Wars Rebels: Path of the Jedi
programme.desc: Ezra must face a great challenge as part of his growth as a member of the team.

programme.title: America's Game: 2013 Seattle Seahawks
programme.desc: The story of the 2013 Seattle Seahawks and their run to Super Bowl XLVIII told through the eyes of Russell Wilson, Richard Sherman and Head Coach Pete Carroll.

programme.title: America's Game: 2019 Kansas City Chiefs
programme.desc: A look back at the 2019 Kansas City Chiefs run to Super Bowl LIV through the eyes of Super Bowl MVP Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and Tyrann Mathieu.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jim Brown
programme.desc: The football life of perhaps the greatest player in NFL history and his impact both on and off the field.

programme.title: A Football Life: Walter Payton
programme.desc: The life of Walter Payton and the legacy of the Bears running back, built from an unyielding ''never die easy'' will that defined him from the days of running hills in suburban Chicago to his untimely passing in 1999.

programme.title: A Football Life: Emmitt Smith
programme.desc: Emmitt Smith makes an indelible impact on the game of football and builds a case as the greatest running back of all time by breaking one of the NFL's hallowed records and making everyone around him better.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Rice
programme.desc: 'A Football Life' chronicles the story of how an un-recruited small-town wide receiver became the greatest of all time.

programme.title: A Football Life: Doug Williams
programme.desc: Doug Williams grew up with no running water in rural Louisiana during an era when few African Americans played quarterback. He would overcome adversity and prejudice to become a Heisman nominee, first round pick and Super Bowl MVP.

programme.title: A Football Life: LaDainian Tomlinson
programme.desc: The career and life of LaDainian Tomlinson including his revenge against the Patriots and an emotional trip to learn about his family's roots.

programme.title: The Super Bowl That Wasn't
programme.desc: The story behind how Arizona lost the Super Bowl in 1993 by refusing to celebrate Martin Luther King Jr's birthday as a holiday. Revisit this often forgotten piece of NFL history from various perspectives both new and old.

programme.title: Breaking Ground: A Story of HBCU Football and the NFL
programme.desc: Look at the history and impact of historically black colleges and universities through interviews and profiles of former alumni.

programme.title: America's Game: 1987 Washington Redskins
programme.desc: A sweeping documentary series profiling each Super Bowl-winning team in NFL history.

programme.title: America's Game: 2013 Seattle Seahawks
programme.desc: The story of the 2013 Seattle Seahawks and their run to Super Bowl XLVIII told through the eyes of Russell Wilson, Richard Sherman and Head Coach Pete Carroll.

programme.title: America's Game: 2019 Kansas City Chiefs
programme.desc: A look back at the 2019 Kansas City Chiefs run to Super Bowl LIV through the eyes of Super Bowl MVP Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and Tyrann Mathieu.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jim Brown
programme.desc: The football life of perhaps the greatest player in NFL history and his impact both on and off the field.

programme.title: A Football Life: Walter Payton
programme.desc: The life of Walter Payton and the legacy of the Bears running back, built from an unyielding ''never die easy'' will that defined him from the days of running hills in suburban Chicago to his untimely passing in 1999.

programme.title: A Football Life: Emmitt Smith
programme.desc: Emmitt Smith makes an indelible impact on the game of football and builds a case as the greatest running back of all time by breaking one of the NFL's hallowed records and making everyone around him better.

programme.title: A Football Life: Jerry Rice
programme.desc: 'A Football Life' chronicles the story of how an un-recruited small-town wide receiver became the greatest of all time.

programme.title: A Football Life: Doug Williams
programme.desc: Doug Williams grew up with no running water in rural Louisiana during an era when few African Americans played quarterback. He would overcome adversity and prejudice to become a Heisman nominee, first round pick and Super Bowl MVP.

programme.title: A Football Life: LaDainian Tomlinson
programme.desc: The career and life of LaDainian Tomlinson including his revenge against the Patriots and an emotional trip to learn about his family's roots.

programme.title: A Football Life: Ed Sabol
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the life of the NFL's greatest filmmaker, Ed Sabol, using unique on and off-the-field sights, sounds and stories.

programme.title: A Football Life: Steve Sabol
programme.desc: A Football Life looks back at Steve Sabol's extraordinary career and the lasting legacy he left behind.

programme.title: NFL Films: They Call It Pro Football
programme.desc: John Facenda's first NFL Film tells the stories and memories with unseen footage.

programme.title: Super Bowl Highlights: Super Bowl I: Kansas City Chiefs vs. Green Bay Packers
Super Bowl Highlights: Super Bowl II: Green Bay Packers vs. Oakland Raiders
Super Bowl Highlights: Super Bowl III: New York Jets vs. Baltimore Colts
NFL Football Follies
programme.desc: The best and biggest fumbles, goofs and blunders from the analogues of NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Films Presents: Martyball
programme.desc: Martyball features include: Marty Schottenheimer, Coaches as Teachers, Kosar, The Drive.

programme.title: Willie
programme.desc: The amazing true story of the first Black man to play for an NHL team, Willie O'Ree. Secretly blind in one eye, Willie played 45 games of NHL hockey, and then a further 22 years in the minor leagues before being asked to be the NHL's diversity ambassador.

programme.desc: A young diabetic boy goes missing from his bed, and time is running out to get him insulin. A criminal couple known for producing child pornography is spotted with the boy, but they are not willing to help the investigation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Decaying Morality
programme.desc: Benson and Rollins find a teenage girl in the street and she fingers a man with a criminal record. A conflict of interest arises when it's discovered the suspect has a pending lawsuit against the NYPD.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Undercover Mother
programme.desc: Working undercover to bust a sex trafficking ring, Detective Carisi stumbles upon a mother who has embedded herself as a Madame in the organization for three years in hopes of finding and saving her daughter.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Doubt
programme.desc: A rape investigation becomes a case of 'he-said', 'she-said' when a clever professor is accused.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Paternity
programme.desc: When a family's nanny is found gruesomely murdered, the obvious suspect is her Internet love interest. It soon becomes apparent that her employers are hiding some dark secrets, and the investigation leads to a case of murder and infidelity.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: ...Or Just Looks Like One
programme.desc: A popular teenage model is found beaten, sexually assaulted and dumped.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Repression
programme.desc: When a man accused of child molestation is killed, the whole family is suspected.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Grief
programme.desc: When a cocktail waitress is murdered, the detectives suspect the victim's angry ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Conscience
programme.desc: A boy disappears from a playground and is killed at the hands of a disturbed neighbour.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Plain Sight

programme.title: NCIS: Knockout

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Shouldn't Have Been Alone

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: We Don't Work Together Anymore

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Disco Bob
programme.desc: Bob Ruzek is the first to arrive at the scene of a double murder. Intelligence arrives to take over the investigation and tensions rise when Bob must hand over the case to his son and Voight. Lindsay heads off to Bolivia for a case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Devil Complex
programme.desc: Antonio and his sister Gabriela go to the office of Elliot Gish, the man they believe started the fire that killed Shay. Intelligence puts pressure on Gish to confess. Lindsay approaches Voight about returning to Intelligence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Erin's Mom

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Do You Do?

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Puts You on That Ledge

programme.desc: With a World Trade conference in Chicago, all members of intelligence are undercover in various protest groups to determine potential threats.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Get Back to Even

programme.title: The Middle: Change Is in the Air

programme.desc: Charlene knows what she wants and is ready to walk out with the first dress - if only her mother could see how perfect it is! David will go above and beyond to impress this picky mom, if he doesn't banish the entire entourage from the store first!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: UK: The Only Way is Fishtail Show
programme.desc: For some brides, fishtail is the only silhouette they'll consider when shopping for a wedding gown. It's great to have an idea of what you want, but being too focused on one aspect can cause problems.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Dropping Bombs
programme.desc: Tammy's new doctor gives her what feels like an insurmountable weight goal, but it's not the only challenge she's facing. Amy and Michael drop a bomb that changes everything.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: There's Something About Jerry
programme.desc: Tammy's boyfriend, Jerry, comes to visit just in time to celebrate the sisters' favorite holiday: Halloween. Tammy's sister Misty, however, questions Jerry's intentions. Amy has to face another weigh-in after her concerning appointment with Dr. Procter.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Jerry Bites Back
programme.desc: Amy counts down the days until her delivery with an eccentric photo shoot, while the family worries that Jerry is derailing Tammy's diet. Tammy reveals her big secret to Jerry.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Everybody Hurts
programme.desc: When Tammy and Amy go see a psychic, they both get disturbing news. The family rallies together, and they are willing to try anything to help Tammy lose weight. Amy must face her worst fears when she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Amy gets unsettling news about the birth of her baby as her high-risk pregnancy has last-minute complications. With their next weigh-in ahead of them, Chris and Tammy are cautiously optimistic until Tammy steps on the scale.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Do or Die
programme.desc: Recovering from COVID-19, Tammy now needs constant oxygen, and her weight spirals. Chris faces his final weigh-in, and Amy makes a big decision about her future. With Tammy's romance heating up, the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.desc: Phil is so preoccupied with impressing his new business partner that he doesn't realize the man is being overtly inappropriate with Claire.

programme.desc: This trip, Guy is heading to Cincinnati to try three righteous restaurants all on the same street. He checks out The Funky Pub where they're serving up all kinds of hot dogs and sammies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross Country Comfort Food
programme.desc: Guy is finding great food from the ski slopes to the sea. In Miami, a law student who has traded in his suit for a chef coat is making all kinds of comfort food, from spicy ox tail to big ragu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pub Grub
programme.desc: Guy goes in search of bar food with some Salvadoran classics with a pork sausage pizza - no cheese; scratch dough stuffed with pork and cheese and a vegan club sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mom's Kitchen

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Farm-to-Table Fresh
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is grabbing straight from the garden. He checks in on restaurant vets who closed down their original nose-to-tail eatery and opened a farm-to-table vegan joint. Then, a cafe still sourcing local staples and making everything from scratch.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos, Turtles and Tri-Tip
programme.desc: Guy tries pork belly tacos and carne adovada in a high-energy marketplace.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Truck Flavorfest

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Lost in the Redwoods
programme.desc: As they gather in a forest of California redwoods, host Tyler Florence tells the five remaining food truck teams that they need to forage for ingredients to make a tasty treat. Surprise judges determine whose creation wins the prize.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Peas of Mind
programme.desc: Actress Lela Loren, star of Power, pairs up with Bobby Flay's pal Michael Symon to try to get Bobby to power down in his own kitchen. International chefs Lien Lin and Hamidullah Noori attempt to throw Bobby a curve ball with a dish he's never heard of.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Game On

programme.desc: As temperatures drop to near-freezing, Officers Canfield and Jones use an ROV to search Merrimack River for a missing person. Meanwhile, a man is caught illegally releasing coyotes from traps, and officers host a meet-and-greet at the headquarters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Moose in the City
programme.desc: A team is deployed to relocate a moose that has found its way into the city. During an undercover mission, Officer Egan encounters multiple violating bird hunters, while Officer Canfield rushes to rescue an injured hiker trapped on Mount Carrigain.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.desc: The crew takes on the finishing details around the resort as the soft opening date inches closer.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Our First Year: Open for Business

programme.title: Renovation Island: Marooned
programme.desc: With the hotel shut down due to COVID-19, the Baeumler family is quarantining on the island. Bryan and Sarah have to adapt their business and family plans to the realities of the pandemic, all while updating the resort for future guests.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: A Promise Kept in Panama City Beach

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Third Time is the Charm in Ocean Isle
programme.desc: After losing out on two different houses in Ocean Isle, this couple is hoping that this third attempt will be their last so that they can finally start enjoying the beach life with their two young children.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: New Job, New Digs in Ocean City, NJ
programme.desc: A young couple are making their childhood dreams a reality by relocating to Ocean City, New Jersey. Finding a spacious and affordable place can be challenging in this desirable beach town.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Cashing In on the Caribbean's Best
programme.desc: A couple makes up for living in land-locked Missouri with frequent vacations to tropical destinations. After discovering the affordability of the Dominican Republic, they want to find a place of their own in the Caribbean's top tourist location.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life: French Riviera Fantasy
programme.desc: A couple that's always wanted to live abroad are following their dream and moving to the picturesque south of France. That's about all they agree on during the home tours as they figure out how much they want to spend and how much space they need.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life: From Missouri to Pozzuoli
programme.desc: A couple that fell in love with Italy after a short trip to Rome follows his Air Force career to Pozzuoli. They're looking for a home close to his job with breathtaking views and plenty of outdoor space for their dog to enjoy.

programme.desc: A couple that fell in love with Italy after a short trip to Rome follows his Air Force career to Pozzuoli. They're looking for a home close to his job with breathtaking views and plenty of outdoor space for their dog to enjoy.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Marooned
programme.desc: With the hotel shut down due to COVID-19, the Baeumler family is quarantining on the island. Bryan and Sarah have to adapt their business and family plans to the realities of the pandemic, all while updating the resort for future guests.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Paradise Found
programme.desc: Bryan and Sarah Baeumler, plus their four kids, travel to the Bahamas to begin the renovation of a fifty-year-old beachfront hotel. During demolition, the crew finds major termite damage.

programme.title: Renovation Island: The Deep End
programme.desc: Demolition begins in the honeymoon suite and pool. The crew uncovers decrepit plumbing in the hotel block, putting stress on the build's schedule and budget. The Baeumlers reveal the completion of the resort's pool.

programme.title: House Hunters: Doing it for My Daughter in Illinois
programme.desc: A cash-strapped single mother looks to buy her first home in Zion, Illinois. She's looking for a home with two bedrooms and a yard for her 11-year-old daughter's dog, but her fear of taking on projects will make it difficult with her small budget.

programme.title: House Hunters: No House No Wedding in New Jersey
programme.desc: A man wants to honor his and his fiancee's Armenian culture and purchase a house before they marry. They both like the vibe of pricy, upscale neighborhoods, but his hard-bargaining ways have stretched their house hunt and put their wedding plans on hold.

programme.title: House Hunters: Horses and Beer in Austin, Texas
programme.desc: A couple living in the crowded suburbs wants to move to an area that's less congested in Austin, Texas. She's looking for lots of acreage and wants horses and donkeys, but he prefers to stay near the city and needs a big garage for his craft beer brewing.

programme.title: House Hunters: To Buy or Rent in Fort Lauderdale
programme.desc: A Chicago couple struggles to commit to buying a home after a recent move to Fort Lauderdale, Florida. She's looking for a single family house with a yard for their dogs, but he's only interested in something that's low maintenance at a good price.

programme.title: House Hunters: Indecisive in the Bay Area
programme.desc: A couple is eager to trade their rental for a spacious family home in San Francisco. They're looking for a place to grow their foster family and he prefers an older Craftsman-style house with character, but she wants a new build that's more traditional.

programme.title: House Hunters: Long Distance Dilemma in Des Moines
programme.desc: A woman relocates to buy a home and begin a new life with her boyfriend in De Moines, Iowa. She's looking for a contemporary condo with modern touches, but he prefers a large single-family house with a finished basement and fenced-in yard for his dog.

programme.title: House Hunters: Flood Concerns in Houston
programme.desc: Newcomers to Houston, Texas disagree over his need for fancy finishes in a home. However, they may both be out of their depth when it comes to a housing market where flooding is all too common.

programme.title: House Hunters: Something Old, Something New in Seattle
programme.desc: A newlywed couple struggles to agree on finding their first home together in Seattle. He prefers an older home with character and doesn't mind projects, but she's looking for something modern that's move-in ready with an in-law suite for her father.

programme.title: House Hunters: Getting Hitched in Richmond
programme.desc: An engaged couple is looking to buy their first home in Richmond, Virginia, while planning their wedding. They're both into vintage styles of architecture, but he prefers Queen Anne Victorian homes while she's interested in a Foursquare.

programme.title: House Hunters: Starter Home Bidding War In L.A.
programme.desc: Buyers in Los Angeles want to upgrade from their small rental to bigger home with a yard for their son. She wants a traditional SoCal Spanish style, while he's dead set on a classic Craftsman.

programme.title: House Hunters: Finding Wow Factor in Phoenix
programme.desc: A couple looks to upgrade and find a home with serious wow factor in Phoenix. They're searching for a place with a pool and a great outdoor space for entertaining, and Steven wants a fixer that can build equity, but Bobby prefers something move-in ready.

programme.title: House Hunters: Back From Abroad
programme.desc: A married couple want to move back to America after living in Europe for several years. He wants a smaller home in a walkable neighborhood but she's hoping to purchase a big, American two-story home.

programme.title: Home Town: A House With History
programme.desc: Will, Courtney and their boys have outgrown their starter home, so they enlist Ben and Erin to help them find their forever house. On their wish list is a sizeable, historic house that's rich in character and small town charm.

programme.title: Home Town: Room to Grow
programme.desc: A couple with two kids are in desperate need of more space and hope to find a home with a big yard and studio for his work with an all-in budget of $200,000.

programme.title: Home Town: Retreat Yourself

programme.desc: A college pledge has to seduce an awkward college student to continue her pledge. She reluctantly complies and her 'sisters' play a prank that results in the drugging of the student resulting in an accidental death.

programme.title: Movie: Deadly Exchange
programme.desc: Samantha and her daughter are overjoyed to host their new foreign exchange student, Chloe. Chloe's charms only get her so far and her desire to make Samantha her new mother pushes her over the edge when she doesn't get her way.

programme.title: Movie: Dirty Teacher
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers her teacher is seducing her boyfriend, events turn deadly after the teacher tries to cover it up.

programme.title: Movie: Deadly Transaction

programme.title: Movie: Homecoming Revenge

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: Above and Far Beyond

programme.title: Aliens In Alaska: Captured

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Government Knows
programme.desc: Strange unmarked helicopters fly overhead as Russell, Ronny and Mireya try to make sense of abnormal thermal images they captured near a river. Bryce reaches out to former federal agent Ben Hansen to get to the bottom of the suspicious activity.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Lake Fear
programme.desc: Russell tracks an unknown creature to a mysterious lake hidden in the mountains. The team members enlist a thermal drone to scout the potential Bigfoot hideout but soon realize they are the ones being watched.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Closer Than Ever
programme.desc: The investigation launches into high gear as the team discovers evidence that could prove Bigfoot's existence once and for all. When uncontrolled wildfires erupt in Washington, it's a race against time to find the truth before it burns away.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: New Evidence
programme.desc: For the first time since the end of their expedition, Bryce, Mireya, Ronny and Russell come together to review the evidence they collected. The team reveals exciting new environmental DNA findings that may change the world of Bigfoot research forever.

programme.title: When Monsters Attack: When the Yeti Attacks
programme.desc: Shocking new DNA evidence suggests that the Yeti, one of the world's most elusive and dangerous monsters, may not only come from an otherworldly source but also resides right here in America.

programme.title: Jessie: Katch Kipling

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Skyvolt-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv finds out that Voltage is leaving Stevens Point for Los Angeles and must decide to move with the show or stay in Wisconsin with Maddie.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Californi-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv and Maddie get into a big disagreement while trying to figure out if they'll be together for the next four years or be going their separate ways.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Albums and Auditions
programme.desc: Ally gets accepted to a music school and is so excited that Austin, Dez and Trish sent in an application on her behalf. Unknown to them, the school is in New York, forcing Ally to decide if she wants to move and leave her friends behind.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Everglades and Allygators
programme.desc: The gang heads to Shiny Money's houseboat, and, while Austin and Ally are working on a song, Trish and Dez accidentally lure in a legendary alligator. Chaos quickly ensues as they try to keep the houseboat and their summer vacation afloat.

programme.title: Jessie: To Be Me or Not to Be Me
programme.desc: Jessie gets her first big acting part in a Shakespeare production in the park. When Jessie and Zuri switch personalities, that leaves an eight-year-old trying to pull off Jessie's performance and keep from ruining it for her.

programme.title: Jessie: Toy Con
programme.desc: Zuri must find a way to get back a cherished toy that Jessie passed on to her after she trades it to a toy collector. Meanwhile, Luke and Emma work together to teach Bertram Salsa dancing so he can compete in a dance contest to win his crush's heart.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Riposte
programme.desc: A mysterious masked fencer gets akumatized into Riposte. Armed with her saber, she wants to get revenge on Adrien, who unintentionally humiliated her. To protect him, Ladybug will have to cross swords with the villain!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Befana
programme.desc: Marinette's grandmother gets akumatized. Now Befana, she wants to get revenge on Marinette who would rather spend time with her friends than with her.

programme.title: Sofia the First: The Enchanted Feast
programme.desc: Snow White appears to help Sofia learn the importance of trusting one's instincts after she suspects that a visiting sorceress is not who she says she is.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Two Princesses and Baby
programme.desc: Amber realizes how much her royal twin really means to her after a spell that is supposed to give her and twin James separate birthdays accidentally turns him into a baby.

programme.title: Bluey: Rug Island/ Hairdressers/ Sticky Gecko
programme.desc: Dad washes up on the beach of a desert island. Hairdressers Bluey and Bingo discover that their customer has nits! Bluey and Bingo wait for a rubber gecko to fall from the ceiling!

programme.title: Bluey: Trains/ Queens/ Flat Pack
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo commute on the Dad-Train. Mum is crowned Queen with the girls as her butlers. Bluey and Bingo construct a mini-civilization.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly are made honorary Coast Guard pups to keep every pet safe! Zeus' flying disc soars into the yard of a protective guard dog.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: Jack and Rusty play Army at school. The girls set up a fancy restaurant for Mum and Dad! Bluey, Bingo and Muffin strike a deal with the dads.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show/ Ticklecrabs/ Escape
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey put on a Mother's Day show! The kids play Tickle Crabs with Dad! Bluey and Bingo get dropped off at Nana's.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Truth
programme.desc: Two school kids transform into crime-fighting superheroes to save Paris.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Party Crasher
programme.desc: Because of a misunderstanding, a fan of Adrien's gets akumatized into Party Crasher. Convinced that his star has made a fool of him, he is determined to get revenge.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Puppeteer 2
programme.desc: Manon becomes The Puppeteer again. And she is determined to have fun like never before in a unique playground: the wax museum.

programme.title: Bluey: The Quiet Game/ Postman/ Cafe
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo play The Quiet Game. When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum. In the park, Bluey meets a new playmate, Winnie.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Ding Dongers/ Animation Abomination
programme.desc: Remy uses Cricket's antics to gain views and likes on a new video-sharing app. Then, When Cricket and Tilly learn that Gloria has an internship at the animation studio that produces their favorite cartoon, they beg her to bring them for a visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: The Van/ Bat Girl
programme.desc: Gramma and Cricket are upset that an ugly van has been parked in front of their house for what seems like forever. Then, Nancy joins Cricket and Tilly's community center little league team.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cousin Jilly/ Gloria's Cafe
programme.desc: Tilly revives 'Cousin Jilly,' an alter-ego she created to entertain Cricket when they were younger. Gloria opens a secret café in the former Big Coffee space without permission.

programme.title: Snapped: Susan Monica

programme.desc: When family man Jack Jesse is murdered in his Orange County home, police can't pin down any suspects. It is not until a dedicated detective, a story told at a bar, and a police made mouse trap are all put together that the perpetrators are finally caught.

programme.title: Dateline: The Good Husband
programme.desc: Tom Kolman’s death initially looks like it was due to natural causes. But as police learn about an unconventional love triangle in his life, the investigation goes in a new direction.

programme.title: Dateline: The Good Husband

programme.desc: While working at a sobriety checkpoint, Burgess finds a duffle bag full of heroin in the truck of a respected college professor who claims to know nothing about how the drugs ended up there.

programme.desc: The team sets out to find the individual responsible for stealing a classified Pentagon document, before the wrong party cracks the file's decryption code.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Tin Soldiers

programme.title: NCIS: Hiatus
programme.desc: As the team attempts to put their feelings about Gibb's injury aside and work on the investigation, Tony steps into the role of senior agent, causing a bit of resentment from other team members.

programme.title: NCIS: Hiatus

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: The Doomsday Curse
programme.desc: Ancient scriptures describe the Ark of the Covenant as possessing an almighty force with the capacity to kill; now, an expert team of archaeologists trace the ark's destructive path in a quest to discover the truth behind its mythical power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Ark: The Jeremiah Code
programme.desc: According to biblical scripture, the prophet Jeremiah hid the Ark of the Covenant at a remote location for safekeeping. Now, a team of archaeologists investigate sacred sites and ancient tombs to retrace the possible journey of this lost artifact.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Cult Kings

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Wrath of Thor
programme.desc: When a ghostly figure is caught on tape stalking people in Japan, some fear its hard evidence of a horrifying local legend.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Vampire Down Under
programme.desc: A strange creature on the site of one of the worst nuclear disasters ever sparks fears of a terrifying genetic mutation. New evidence suggests a legendary predator with a thirst for blood might have come back from the dead.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Nuclear Demon Mummy
programme.desc: When a strange, dried-out creature washes ashore downriver from a nuclear power plant, some experts suspect it's the mummified corpse of a mutant; using the latest science and tech, this incredible theory is put to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Secrets of the Himalaya Alien
programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Ghost Park
programme.desc: Deep in the wilderness of the American south, a long-abandoned amusement park is home to secrets of a forgotten, imaginary world. When experts investigate, they reveal why this bizarre place was built and what caused its downfall.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: Was It Worth Killing For?
programme.desc: As a boy, Eric Witte's father taught him to protect his family. But as his father grew increasingly violent, Eric realized his father was the one his family needed protection from. In an extended interview, Eric reflects on the evil that was in his home.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: I Killed Dirty John
programme.desc: Not long after Terra Newell met her mother's new boyfriend, she sensed John Meehan was no good. Debra Newell never suspected her new man was secretly plotting to destroy her and her family. And Terra never imagined she would ultimately be forced to kill.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Father Knows Death: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunt for the Long Island Serial Killer

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: Only if There's Something in It for Me
programme.desc: While being questioned in the abduction of an Anchorage barista, a young local businessman starts negotiating with investigators to reveal details of a depraved secret life as one of America's most meticulous and psychopathic serial killers.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I'm Not the Monster I Was
programme.desc: An unapologetic 14-year-old boy confesses to the murder of his best friend. Twelve years later, he's back in court with chance at a reduced sentence.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Complicated Relationship
programme.desc: A beloved mother of four disappears just days after her stepdaughter vanished. Police must investigate to find out if their complicated relationship led to tragedy.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Hunt for the Long Island Serial Killer
